allow: Bash(C:/xampp/php/php.exe -r "echo 'OPcache: '; echo ini_get\('opcache.enable'\) ? 'BẬT' : 'TẮT'; echo PHP_EOL; echo 'Memory limit: ' . ini_get\('memory_limit'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'Max execution: ' . ini_get\('max_execution_time'\) . 's' . PHP_EOL;")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://staygo.local/chatbot -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-CSRF-TOKEN: test" -d '{"message":"xin chao"}')
